title: The Still Point

title: Weight of Flesh
description: Target creature within 10 feet: apply Expose 2 and Root. If target has cybernetics, Root extends 1 additional round.

title: Unmarked Strike
description: Free once-per-turn basic attack scaling with Active Stat. Deals 4 + Active Stat damage. Before any cards are named, this is all The Unnamed can reliably do.

title: Basic Attack (Veilblade)
description: Free suppressed strike. Once per turn.

title: Blacksite
description: Establish a completely signal-null zone; effective barrier for Wire Craft.

title: Clean Strike
description: Near-perfect elimination strike; minimal trace, maximum effect.

title: Evasion Protocol
description: Automated evasion sequence from accumulated signal intelligence.

title: Ghost Walk
description: Move through network or physical space while maintaining null signature.

title: Inevitable
description: Target acquisition becomes absolute; nothing can prevent this action.

title: Marked Target
description: Designate target for enhanced follow-up attacks.

title: Network Weapon
description: Use Wire Craft network infrastructure as offensive weapon.

title: Precision Strike
description: Targeted attack through suppressed signature minimizing detection.

title: The Unwitnessed
description: Capstone: act without any record, trace, or witness ever knowing.

title: Uncanny Dodge
description: Exploit signal intelligence to anticipate and avoid attack.

title: Wire Assault
description: Attack delivered through or using Wire Craft network.

title: Wire Entry
description: Enter Wire Craft network for movement or information access.

title: Basic Attack (Voice of Debt)
description: Free obligation-weighted strike. Once per turn.

title: Chain Detonation
description: Primary target: 12 + VEIL plus 5 per stack; remove Debt. Others within 20 feet: 6 + VEIL plus 2 per their own Debt.

title: Compound Interest
description: Deal 8 + VEIL damage; apply Debt 3. If target reaches 4+ Debt also apply Expose 2.

title: First Detonation
description: Target with Debt stacks: deal 6 + VEIL plus 3 per Debt stack damage; remove all Debt; apply Stagger.

title: Full Detonation
description: Target with Debt: deal 10 + VEIL plus 5 per Debt stack; remove all Debt; apply Expose 4 and Vulnerable 3.

title: Ledger Entry
description: Apply Debt 3 to one target within 40 feet; costs 0 AP if you played Social or Signal card this turn.

title: Oath-Breaker's Weight
description: Deal 4 + VEIL damage to target with 1+ Debt; apply Stagger; apply Debt 2 more.

title: Oath Read
description: Know obligations within 30 feet; learn HP tier and status of one target; apply Debt 2.

title: The Debt of All Things
description: Capstone: apply Debt 5 to all without Debt; then Detonate all: 14 + VEIL plus 6 per stack; Expose 6 + Vulnerable 5.

title: Weight of Obligation
description: Deal 5 + VEIL damage; apply Debt 2; deal +VEIL bonus if target carries Debt.

title: Basic Attack (Void Walker)
description: Free phase-state strike. Once per turn.

title: Between the Worlds
description: Capstone: exist permanently between states; neither fully here nor there.

title: Phase Cascade
description: Chain phase transitions delivering sequential strikes.

title: Phase Dodge
description: Phase through incoming attack; negate damage through void transition.

title: Phase Step
description: Step partially into void; ignore terrain and reduce incoming damage.

title: Phase Strike
description: Attack through void phase; damage cannot be reduced by physical armor.

title: Sustained Phase
description: Maintain extended partial void state for ongoing defense.

title: Void Burst
description: Explosive void detonation hitting all enemies in radius.

title: Void Pull
description: Use void transition to displace target's position.

title: Void Sovereign
description: Signature: claim absolute dominion over void transitions in this area.

title: Void Step
description: Full void repositioning; appear from nothing within range.

title: Void Strike
description: Strike from partial void state; bypasses certain defenses.

title: Infrastructure Broadcast
description: 40-foot radius: enemies with Wire Craft dependency take 4 + SIGNAL damage + Silence 1 turn. Cannot use while under Silence.

title: Signal Hijack
description: Target enemy within 30 feet with active Signal card: negate and immediately play as own card. Once per enemy per combat.

title: Basic Attack (Wireweave)
description: Free signal strike. Once per turn.

title: Cascade Flicker
description: Signal cascade jumping through connected targets.

title: Cascade Shutdown
description: Chain shutdown disabling multiple connected enhancement systems.

title: Enhancement Disrupt
description: Temporarily disable or degrade target's enhancement functions.

title: Ghost Sovereign
description: Capstone: become fully invisible and untraceable within Wire Craft environments; the network sees through your eyes alone.

title: Ghost Step
description: Phase through Wire Craft infrastructure for repositioning.

title: Interference Pulse
description: Disrupt signal-dependent abilities in targeted area.

title: Neural Spike
description: Targeted attack through neural-wire connection; bypasses armor.

title: Signal Dart
description: Precise signal bolt leveraging SIGNAL stat.

title: Signal Skim
description: Quick signal-frequency attack skimming enhancement vulnerabilities.

title: System Override
description: Take full control of target's Wire Craft integrated systems.

title: The Architect
description: Signature: reshape Wire Craft infrastructure to your design.

title: The Weave Speaks
description: Absolute signal authority; the network obeys.

title: Wire Burn
description: Overload Wire Craft network for massive channeled damage.

title: Wire Crash
description: Force infrastructure crash; area control through system shutdown.

title: Wire Lock
description: Bind target within Wire Craft infrastructure, applying Root or Silence.
